description.data: Ultra-lightweight freestanding backpacking tent. Features the new OSMO poly-nylon ripstop fabric that reduces stretch when wet. Minimum weight is only 948g. Perfect for thru-hiking.
A 55-liter ultralight backpack made from 100% waterproof Dyneema Composite Fabric (DCF). Ideal for environments where tough, waterproof gear is necessary. Weighs just 898g.
The gold standard in ultralight backpacking sleeping pads. The NXT version is significantly quieter and thicker (3 inches) with an R-Value of 4.5. Weighs only 354g in regular size.
Highly versatile ultralight sleeping quilt. Features 850 fill power down and a zippered footbox that allows it to lay flat like a blanket on warm nights. Comfort rated to -6°C. Weighs 665g.
Next-generation ultralight backpacking stove. Boils 1 liter of water in 3.5 minutes. Barely noticeable in your pack at just 73 grams. Folds down exceptionally small.
The most popular water filter for thru-hikers. Hollow fiber membrane filters out 99.99999% of all bacteria and protozoa. Screws onto standard water bottles. Weighs 85g.
The ultimate emergency layer. 100% recycled nylon ripstop windbreaker with a DWR finish. Packs down to the size of an apple into its own chest pocket. Weighs 105g.
Purpose-built for ultralight hikers. USB-C rechargeable, 400 lumens max output, with both dual-beam spotlight and floodlight. Features an ultra-light shock cord headband. Total weight 45g.

name.data: Black Diamond Distance Carbon Z Trekking Poles

description.data: 100% carbon fiber construction makes these the lightest folding poles on the market. Z-Pole folding design allows for rapid deployment and compact storage. Weight per pair is 273g.
Minimalist titanium cooking pot. Large enough to boil water for a dehydrated meal and a coffee. Fits a 100g fuel canister and small stove inside. Comes with a lid and bail handle. Weighs 103g.

name.data: Big Agnes Fly Creek HV UL2

description.data: Premium 2-person ultralight tent. Known for its steep walls and maximum internal volume. Great for backcountry camping.
The quintessential thru-hiking tent made of DCF. Extremely lightweight, sets up with two trekking poles.
The best-selling 2-person freestanding tent. Known for extreme durability and livability, excellent head clearance.
Innovative Tension Ridge architecture creates more headroom and airflow than any other tent in its class.
Offers asymmetrical floor dimensions providing ample room compared to standard ultralight tents. Uses new Osmo fabric.

name.data: Big Agnes Copper Spur HV UL3

description.data: A fully freestanding 3-person tent that still falls under the ultralight category. Excellent for couples wanting more space.
A versatile hybrid single-wall/double-wall design. Can be set up freestanding with trekking poles.
Incredible value for an ultralight trekking pole tent. Very spacious for two hikers and extremely packable.
Geometrically efficient trekking pole tent that pitches intuitively with four stakes. Exceptional performance in wind.
A distinctive single-pole design that offers unmatched space per ounce. Fully enclosed protection from elements and bugs.
Four-season capable 1-person tent. Superb strength-to-weight ratio using Kerlon 1000 fabric.
A more affordable light tent choice with a massive interior space relative to its weight footprint.
DCF trekking pole tent designed for grueling long-distance hikes. Simple, refined, and nearly indestructible.
Semi-freestanding tent providing an incredible balance of low weight and easy pitching.
Features pre-bent zone construction to expand vertical walls, providing more sleeping area.
A soloist's dream; insane minimum weight with real weather resistance using the high-end Osmo fabric.
A very specialized sil-nylon shelter stripping away all non-essentials to drop below the 1kg threshold.

name.data: Black Diamond Distance Tent with Adapter

description.data: Designed to integrate perfectly with Black Diamond trekking poles for a remarkably fast and robust pitch.
A budget-friendly choice that borrows heavily from premium light designs, slightly heavier but very durable.
A highly packable trekking-pole tent providing reliable brand value and fantastic venting mechanics.
A classic lightweight backpack featuring the AirSpeed suspension system for incredible ventilation on the trail.
An ultralight DCF backpack featuring a carbon fiber frame that bends to create an air gap for your back.
Award-winning lightweight pack. Highly versatile with a massive asymmetrical side pocket designed for a tent.
40L pack made with 100% waterproof Dyneema composite fabric. Mesh external pockets are perfect for drying wet gear.
One of the most popular packs on the PCT. Extremely durable with a hybrid frame system supporting up to 35 lbs.
Highly adjustable pack with a fully removable lid and internal frame sheet for extreme weight minimization.
Frameless ultralight pack designed for ounce-counting thru-hikers carrying low base weights.
Customizable lightweight framed pack balancing load-carrying capability with an ultralight ethos.
Features a unique vest-yoke harness system providing maximum comfort and load distribution while moving fast.
Sleek, frameless pack utilizing durable EcoPak fabric. Ideal for dialed-in ultralight setups.
Famous frameless pack with a bottom stretch pocket for accessing snacks on the go without taking the pack off.
Active spine technology allows the backpack to move dynamically with the spine, saving energy on uneven terrain.
Osprey's foray into extreme ultralight territory. Very stripped-down design using super-light specialty fabrics.
A strong robust lightweight option providing classic Deuter comfort padding with a heavily reduced overall weight.
A lightweight pack that retains legendary Mystery Ranch durability. Easy top-loading and robust zipper access.
Running-vest inspired dual sternum straps with a fast-pack design meant to blur the line between running and hiking.
A fastpacking masterpiece. Roll-top weatherproof closure and a vest-like harness designed to run seamlessly on the trail.
Medium-volume sibling to the Mariposa. Outstanding durability and a fan-favorite sit pad frame sheet.
A lightweight pack supporting up to 30 lbs, functioning perfectly as a bridge between heavy traditional and frameless UL.
An aggressively minimalist frameless DCF pack with no hip belt. Built exclusively for sub-10 lb base weights.
Features Spaceframe baffles for a quieter, more stable sleep. Insulated with metalized film for an R-value of 4.2.

name.data: Sea to Summit Ether Light XT Insulated

description.data: Extra thick (4-inch) pad for side sleepers. Uses Air Sprung Cells for comfort. R-value of 3.2.
Budget friendly ultralight pad with unique V-shaped chambers to limit air movement and heat loss. R-value 1.3.
Lightweight, recycled 20D ripstop polyester with synthetic insulation. Perfect for 3-season backpacking. R-value of 2.9.
The classic closed-cell foam pad. Indestructible, folds like an accordion. Good for adding R-value to other pads.
Extremely light and thick 3.25-inch pad made from recycled nylon ripstop. High R-value of 4.3.
Single layer of medium resolution cells to give you the lightest and smallest packed-volume mat without compromising comfort.
The best warmth-to-weight ratio available. Incredible R-value of 7.3 for deep winter camping while remaining ultralight.
Closed-cell foam pad with dual-density foam optimization for slightly better comfort and packability than competitors.
Four-season capable ultralight pad insulated with high-grade synthetic microfiber. R-value 4.8.
Incredibly affordable 4-season pad with Klymalite synthetic insulation. R-value 4.4.
Off-the-charts comfort with 3.5 inches of thickness. Slightly heavier but worth the weight for side sleepers. R-value 4.2.
Self-inflating foam block design. While heavier than air pads, it offers supreme reliability and puncture resistance.
A 1/8 inch Evazote foam pad used primarily under inflatable pads to prevent slipping and punctures, or as a minimalist frame.
Incredible budget entry providing 3-season capability at an unbeatable price. Easy inflation.
Utilizes TILT heat reflective film reducing radiant heat loss. R-value 4.8, geared towards alpine use.

name.data: Sea to Summit Camp Plus SI

description.data: Self-inflating and very comfortable with variable foam coring. Heavier side, suited for mixed backpacking.
Seamlessly integrates with Zenbivy bed suites. Quiet fabric and vertically cored sponge design.
A hybrid design combining the thickness of an air pad with the plush durability of a foam pad.
Excellent 3-season value pad with horizontal baffles. High R-value of 4.9 covering nearly all temperature ranges.
Customizable quilt with incredibly high quality down. Features a fully insulated footbox for cold nights. Very popular among thru-hikers.
Premium ultralight quilt with aggressive differential cut and elite 900-fill down. Famous pad attachment system.
Legendary sleeping bag. Narrow cut to maximize warmth efficiency, utilizing 850+ fill goose down and a full collar.
Ultra-packable 900-fill quilt leveraging Therm-a-Rest's internal box baffled construction for amazing warmth-to-weight ratio.
Similar to the Revelation, but featuring a permanently sewn closed footbox to eliminate drafts in much colder conditions.
Mummy bag engineered for gram counters. Ultra-dry down treatment combined with super thin 10D shell fabric.
Features a classic spoon shape offering generous room at the elbows and knees. Thermo-Gills let you vent body heat.
Expandable mummy bag with two side zipper panels that can increase sleeping space up to 10 extra inches.
Top-tier mountaineering mummy bag featuring 850-fill goose down and a tightly baffled hood.
Anatomically designed footbox and smooth, curved baffles help keep down in place on this extremely light traditional mummy bag.
A European favorite quilt offering phenomenal value, using 850 cuin Polish goose down and Pertex Quantum fabric.
Essentially a highly enclosed quilt without a hood, using super-premium down and no-snag zipper systems.
Excellent value ultralight mummy bag offering performance comparable to bags that cost significantly more.
Highly bespoke quilt designed with intense attention to draft control. Features differential cutting and unique tensioning straps.
A highly versatile summer quilt that doubles as a hammock underquilt or top quilt. Made with DWR treated down.
A reliable, lightweight 3-season mummy bag providing a comfortably tapered fit and high quality 700-fill down.
Rab's flagship ultralight bag utilizing 900-fill down and a weight-saving chevron baffle system.
Zipperless sleeping bag that mimics the comfort of a bed at home with an integrated comforter flap.
An incredible budget entry that utilizes 800-fill down. Slightly heavier materials but outstanding warmth-per-dollar.
One of the absolute best budget quilts, utilizing duck down to keep prices low while retaining an ultralight profile.
Premium down hoody providing exceptional warmth for its weight. Features Down Composite Mapping to place synthetic insulation where moisture may buildup.
A legendary ultralight down jacket. Uses 100% recycled ultralight ripstop shell and 800-fill RDS-certified down.
Offers the best warmth-for-weight of any jacket Patagonia has ever built. Synthetic PlumaFill insulation mimics the structure of down.
Custom built hyper-light synthetic jacket utilizing climashield APEX insulation. Outstanding warmth even when wet.
Utilizes Pertex Quantum Pro fabric for advanced wind and water resistance alongside high quality European goose down.
Extremely packable down jacket engineered with a stitch-through baffle construction and 900-fill down for high-altitude pursuits.
Diamond Fuse technology makes this ultralight ran shell 5x more tear-resistant than its award-winning predecessor.
Specifically designed for thru-hikers. Uses a custom 3-layer breathable waterproof material and features pit zips.
A slightly heavier but incredibly robust Gore-Tex shell providing bombproof protection for severe storms on the trail.
Lightweight, breathable and quick-drying technical fleece designed for high-exertion activities in cold conditions.
Cult-classic polartec grid fleece handmade in Colorado. Features a unique balaclava style hood.
Pushing the limits of ultralight. Features 1000-fill power goose down in an unthinkably light 7-denier nylon shell.
Polartec Alpha Direct mesh fleece. Unbelievably light active insulation that requires a wind shell to trap heat.
Ultralight softshell designed for climbers and fastpackers. Highly breathable fabric that blocks wind and light precip.
Exceptional value 850-fill down jacket that competes directly with flagship models twice its price.
Well-ventilated outdoor jacket for long treks. Not ultralight, but famously rugged using G-1000 Eco stretch fabric.
The ultimate budget thru-hiking rain shell. Extremely cheap, fully waterproof, surprisingly breathable, though delicate.
Less Is More concept. Extremely minimalist Gore-Tex Paclite jacket that disappears in the bag until needed.
Versatile all-season mountain jacket offering elite waterproof performance and severe high-altitude wind resistance.
Technical softshell utilizing Gore-Tex Infinium for absolute windproofness during exposed alpine ascents.
Award-winning trekking trousers designed for performance and durability in difficult terrain. Features G-1000 Eco and stretch fabric.
Highly versatile softshell pant delivering light weather protection, breathable comfort, and mobility.
A legendary climbing and hiking pant offering 4-way stretch, abrasion resistance, and a roll-up leg feature.
The ultimate softshell pant for hikers. Wind and water resistant, highly breathable, and remarkably stretchy.
Multifunctional, lightweight and quick-drying hiking pants made with 65% recycled nylon.
Tough, durable, and comfortable. Cut from an innovative DURALUX fabric that feels like cotton but performs like a synthetic.
Lightweight, quick-drying hiking pant for warm weather. Designed for maximum breathability on the trail.
Classic convertible hiking pants with UPF 50 sun protection and excellent moisture wicking properties.
A clean, functional trekking pant that seamlessly bridges the gap between town aesthetics and trail performance.
Lighter version of the Keb trousers, optimized for warm conditions using G-1000 Lite and highly ventilated stretch panels.
A long-time favorite among fastpackers. Exceptionally light and stretchable 4-way material that resists water and wind.
Midweight softshell pants designed for all-season mountain use, offering excellent wind resistance and rugged face fabric.
Tough, lightweight, and breathable. Utilizing TACTEL fabric with CORDURA reinforcements for harsh rocky environments.
A sturdy and flexible hiking pant utilizing robust Climatic fabric with durable DWR treatment.
Lightweight alpine pants meant for moving fast over rocky terrain. Very durable with extreme stretch.
A three-season softshell pant that’s incredibly packable and highly breathable for dynamic ascents.

name.data: The North Face Paramount Trail Pants

description.data: Relaxed fit, ultra-durable nylon pants equipped with a DWR finish. A reliable standard for everyday hiking.

name.data: REI Co-op Sahara Guide Convertible Pants

description.data: Zip-off convertible pants that dry rapidly and block harsh sun, making them perfect for desert or humid trekking.
A highly technical, close-fitting pant optimized for demanding hiking. Uses Schoeller Dry Skin stretch properties.
An athletic, versatile hiking pant using miDori treatment for optimal moisture management.
Legendary trail running shoe famous for maximum cushioning and exceptional Vibram Megagrip traction. Ideal for thru-hiking.
The thru-hiker staple. Zero-drop platform and a massive FootShape toe box let your feet splay naturally over countless miles.
An aggressively lugged trail monster built to devour mud and technical, soft terrain with unmatched grip.
A traditional, highly durable trail runner providing excellent rock protection and a very stable platform.
Incredibly nimble and lightweight trail runner. Offers aggressive lugs in a fast, responsive package.
A heavily cushioned trail runner with a roomy toe box. Provides a more traditional heel-to-toe drop than Altra.
A low-profile, highly technical mountain running shoe built for technical scrambling and loose rocky terrain.
The most famous traditional hiking shoe. Reliable, highly breathable out of the box comfort paired with a Vibram sole.
Blurs the line between a trail running shoe and a traditional hiking boot. Offers waterproof protection and superb chassis stability.
Zero-drop trail shoe utilizing graphene-enhanced rubber for out-of-this-world durability and grip on hard-packed trails.
The perfect road-to-trail hybrid. Lighter than the Speedgoat, with versatile lugs that perform on pavement and dirt.
Maximum cushion zero-drop shoe. Designed for ultra-marathon distances where premium underfoot protection is mandatory.
Features Missiongrip technology and signature CloudTec elements for a unique blend of impact absorption and uphill drive.
A high-mileage trail running shoe offering outstanding agility and rugged protection for jagged alpine trails.
Incredibly comfortable and plush daily trail runner. Best suited for well-groomed trails and long transitioning miles.
Iconic, chunky hiking shoe with a massive toe bumper. Fully waterproof and built to withstand years of abuse.
A rugged bruiser of a trail shoe. Less flex, more protection; engineered specifically for intense off-trail hiking.
Specifically designed for long and ultra-distance runs. Provides excellent energy return and a hidden lacing system.
Fast-and-light waterproof hiking shoe featuring a minimalist design but packing a highly compressed EVA midsole.
A robust approach shoe crossed with an alpine runner. Excellent for intense Via Ferrata or scrambling routes.
Windproof, enclosed stove system perfect for boiling water rapidly in harsh alpine conditions.
Award-winning ultralight stove featuring a micro regulator that outputs consistent heat in freezing temps.
Jetboil's lightest stove system ever. Folds into itself perfectly, including the 100g fuel canister.
A classic, durable canister stove that provides an excellent wide flame spread for actual cooking rather than just boiling.
Incredibly fast high-flow hollow fiber filter built into a collapsible soft flask. Perfect for trail runners.
High-capacity gravity water filter ideal for basecamps and larger groups. Effortlessly filters 4 liters in minutes.
Not just a filter, but a purifier. Removes viruses, heavy metals, and chemicals. Ideal for international travel.
Redesigned ultra-durable squeeze filter that functions as a straw, bottle filter, or inline gravity system.
Hard-anodized aluminum pot featuring a pivoting handle that locks securely in place and a strainer lid.
Complete cooking set for two people that nests perfectly into the 1.4-liter pot. Very space efficient.
The ubiquitous backpacking utensil. Indestructible, ultralight, and functional.
The ultimate backpacking luxury item. A fully functional camp chair that weighs only one pound.
A lightweight, sturdy camp stool that practically disappears in your pack.
A sleeve sleeve kit that turns your 20-inch sleeping pad into a comfortable camp lounger.
Extremely versatile 450-lumen headlamp that accepts either the included USB rechargeable Core battery or 3 AAA batteries.
A compact, waterproof headlamp featuring PowerTap technology for instant transitioning between full and dimmed power.
Ultra-thin 3D SlimFit construction sits flush on the forehead without bouncing, making it perfect for trail runners.
Collapsible solar-powered lantern that provides 60 lumens of warm light on maximum setting.
Essential satellite communicator for deep backcountry travel. Allows for two-way SOS messaging and location tracking.
The thru-hiker industry standard power bank. Enough capacity to charge a standard smartphone almost three times.
